name: Harald
description: This wizard never had an artwork...Lazy ass...

name: JD
description: Dealer Jesus <3

name: MrFork
description: Mr Fork is a fork. He likes to stab you :)

name: Plinky
description: Plinky is an undiscovered species. No one nows, what he is. Or she or it.

name: Snaker
description: This is not a snake! it is indeed a human.

name: Froggy
description: Froggy größter Ehrenmann!

name: Alpaka
description: Everyone knows what an alpaka is. He hates  children! Just like i do.

name: Jerk
description: Jerk was a cat a long time ago! He has no penis

name: Wanderer
description: Crawling in the woods for humans. He likes them.

name: Mechanic
description: *bzz bzz* Your car is repaired!

name: Ant
description: Ants crawl in your holes. This Ant is known to be chill tho.

name: Fisher
description: You do never now what´s the next thing on his stick..

name: Slave
description: Slave him or get slaved.

name: Dealer
description: Stay away from the OPP´s..

name: Händler
description: This HÄNDLER accepts cash only..

name: Headshot
description: Legends begin and end with a single bullet.

name: Walker
description: There is only one walker in the world. But there are about 1.000.000.000 worlds

name: Mr_Mr
description: Some say there are two of him. Others say more.

name: Falling
description: Once in a million.STAY RARE STAY DEAD.

name: Tree
description: Its roots reach places that should not exist.

name: Princess
description: Her kingdom vanished long ago, but she remains.

name: UltraCockHaze
description: Ultra rare Cockball-Powder-PREMIUM-Haze! sincery, JD <3

name: Mailman
description: Nobody knows where he gets his letters from. Nobody wants to find out.

name: Toaster
description: He was designed for bread. He chose violence instead.

name: Void Cat
description: It stares into the void. The void usually looks away.

name: Taxman
description: You can run. You can hide. You still owe him money.

name: Bus Driver
description: He knows exactly where every road ends.

name: Lamp
description: It has witnessed things. Terrible things.

name: Microwave
description: MMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMM.

name: Observer
description: If you can see him, he has already seen you.

name: Missing Texture
description: ERROR: Creature not found.

name: Developer
description: Works perfectly on his machine.

name: Bus Driver
description: He always arrives exactly when he is supposed to. Never earlier. Never later.

name: Deer Watcher
description: The deer is watching. The question is why.

name: Red Light Figure
description: When the lights appear, it is already too late.

name: Roulette Man
description: Everything is a gamble. Especially your survival.

name: The Wandering Soul
description: Lost between destinations. Forgotten by everyone.

name: Hospital Patient
description: Nobody remembers admitting him.

name: Bench Sleeper
description: Just five more minutes...

name: Adrenaline Junkie
description: One more shot. What could possibly go wrong?

name: CCTV Watcher
description: Every camera is connected. Every camera is watching.

name: The Last Passenger
description: The bus was empty. It should have been empty.
